title: 12 Days of Top Hits - Day 11 | #shorts
full_text: mom what's Bitcoin okay listen up I'm going to explain the Bitcoin people make it sound so complicated and it's so simple Bitcoin is currency that you buy from Shady websites as far as I can tell it doesn't really exist but then you brag about it to everyone you know you post about it you do swipe up story and whenever you can you keep saying Bitcoin Bitcoin Bitcoin eventually somebody's going to think it is very valuable and then when that happens you sell it and buy Amazon see I told you so simple cheers
